content_body: The only complaint I have about staying at Serendipity is that we did not stay long enough! We were not at all ready to leave. The cabin is just as it seems in the photos. The view is breathtaking, everything from the kitchen to the hot tub to the outdoor fireplace was perfection. Very well stocked kitchen, spectacular view, comfortable beds, and plenty of room to spread out. The staff at Cabins Rentals was very helpful and easy to work with. I will definitely will return for another stay.
title: Definitely Will Return for Another Stay
